data.title: Ipsen provides update on Phase III BOLD trial in biliary atresia
data.description: On 24 July 2026, Ipsen shared that the Phase III BOLD trial comparing Bylvay to placebo for patients with biliary atresia (BA) post-Kasai hepatoportoenterostomy (HPE) did not achieve the primary outcome of enhancing native liver survival compared to placebo. The latest data aligns with the known safety profile of odevixibat in authorized uses. BA, a swift-progressing and intricate condition, stands as the primary reason for pediatric liver transplants, lacking approved treatments aside from Kasai HPE or liver transplants. Ipsen is listed on Euronext as IPN and on ADR as IPSEY.

data.title: Fractal posts 20% revenue growth and 92% net income growth in Q1 FY27
data.description: In the financial results for the first quarter of fiscal year 2027, ending on June 30, 2026, Fractal Analytics Ltd reported significant growth in Adjusted EBITDA, which increased by 35% year-over-year. The gross margin also improved by 29 basis points to reach 46%. Additionally, the Adjusted EBITDA Margin saw a notable increase of 189 basis points, reaching 17%. Fractal Analytics Ltd, publicly traded on the Bombay Stock Exchange under the symbol 544700 and on the National Stock Exchange under the symbol FRACTAL, shared these results from New York on July 24, 2026.

data.title: Global Wellness Summit Announces Speakers and Topics--Including the Latest in Longevity Medicine, Women's Health, Wellness Travel and Neuroaesthetics
data.description: In November, wellness leaders will convene in Thailand to mark the 20th anniversary Summit, delving into the future of the industry valued at an estimated $6.8 trillion. This event comes at a pivotal moment for the sector. Thailand is set to host the global dialogue on wellness, emphasizing its significance.

data.title: ASUS Accelerates Enterprise AI at Scale with 6th-Gen AMD EPYC Server CPUs
data.description: ASUS unveils a new server lineup utilizing 6th-gen AMD EPYC Server CPUs for enhanced performance in enterprise AI, cloud services, virtualization, and critical business tasks. The announcement was made in San Francisco on July 24, 2026. This cutting-edge server series is driven by the AMD EPYC™ 9006 processor, offering scalability and efficiency for diverse computing needs.

data.title: Technological Breakthrough丨Niutech's Titanium-Iron Tailings Reduction and Enrichment Technology and Equipment Boost Global Strategic Mineral Resource Recovery
data.description: Niutech, a prominent player in industrial continuous pyrolysis technology based in LINYI, China, unveiled its latest advancement on July 24, 2026. The innovative "new-generation titanium-iron tailings reduction and enrichment technology and complete equipment" is designed to specifically address the needs of the industry. The technology showcases the company's commitment to advancement in this field.
